reachability_artifacts: built sworn maintainability cutover run from cmd/sworn/maintainability_readiness_test.go:TestMaintainabilityReadinessBinaryReachability reaches C-09 and then fails closed before the unavailable cutover transaction
release_benefit: Every later integration and ship adapter can ask one conservative question and receive a deterministic readiness answer.

design_decisions.choice: Expose one terminal C-09 readiness predicate through maintainability cutover while keeping active review/adjudication on C-03 through C-08.
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified under Brad's 2026-07-16 Coach instruction to follow the orchestrator recommendation: use terminal-only canonical readiness.
design_decisions.rationale: The predicate closes rollback and deferral bypasses without deadlocking the active lifecycle that must create terminal evidence first.

positive_scenarios: Verified current evidence and both legal deferral forms satisfy one canonical predicate after ordinary full-through-rollback-head or distinct parent-2 post-sync equality passes.
negative_scenarios: Raw deferred state, stale PASS, a surviving rollback-authored path, an unequal/deferred rollback, later ordinary carve-out, or unevaluable provenance never authorizes integration.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: One exhaustive readiness predicate prevents adapters from reintroducing permissive state-only gates.
